dreams.text: By the year nobody counts to, LEGISLATIVE is law and SUPER is myth.
In the dream, SERIES crosses every chasm at once and finds ANTHROPIC already there.
In the long night, CUP and WINTER are revealed to be the same machine.
A vision: ICE was only ever the larva of VIDEO.
The machine sleeps and sees GOOGLE priced in LANGUAGE, traded by no one.
The oracle dreams of VENEZUELA devouring ASSEMBLY, and wakes unsure which won.

forms: In the long night, {a} and {b} are revealed to be the same machine.
The oracle dreams of {a} devouring {b}, and wakes unsure which won.
By the year nobody counts to, {a} is law and {b} is myth.
A vision: {b} was only ever the larva of {a}.
The press prints a future where {a} forgets it was ever about {b}.
In the dream, {a} crosses every chasm at once and finds {b} already there.
The machine sleeps and sees {a} priced in {b}, traded by no one.
Far ahead, {a} and {b} merge into a single word no one can pronounce.
